name: Parsnip, Chicken and Orange Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy covered pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the garlic cloves and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the parsnips (fresh or pre-roasted) to the pan and stir to combine.
5. Cook the vegetables together for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. If using pre-roasted parsnips, add them a few minutes before the end of cooking time.
7. Slowly pour in the hot chicken stock while stirring gently.
8. Return any reserved roasted parsnip pieces and stir to incorporate.
9. Add salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
10. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes, until vegetables are tender.
11. Using an immersion blender or regular blender, puree the soup until smooth.
12. Taste the soup and adjust seasoning if needed with additional orange juice.
13. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
() Parsnips release their full sweetness when roasted; cooking them in other ways may result in an unpleasant flavor.
